approved_allowed_only_when: reviewer identity, role, date, decision, and acknowledgements are recorded
petal_hf_language_rules: local PETAL-style rows are not PETAL verification
local Hugging Face-ready paths are not Hugging Face uploads
ready_allowed_only_when: validator, score, and human-review gates are satisfied
verified_allowed_only_when: specific verifier evidence and approval record are present
